svg.text: Items where price is entered at time of sale — market price, chef specials, variable-price packages
price_cents is NULL in pos_menu_items — staff enter actual price at the register. Floor/ceiling enforced in POS firmware.
Every entered price is audit-logged with staff_id. Manager PIN gates apply above the configured threshold per item.
pos_menu_items.price_cents int NULLABLE -- NULL = open price item
-- Audit trail: open price entries logged
-- price_entered_by is non-null when item is open-price
if entered < floor_cents then reject('Below floor price')
if entered > ceiling_cents then reject('Exceeds ceiling price')
* Floor must be ≤ ceiling. Manager threshold is optional but must be within floor–ceiling range if set.
When rung up, staff sees price-entry keypad:
